pages.title: Which thoraxes kneel
pages.text: $(rev)Cow, Pig, Spider, Squid, Camel$(warn) torsos expose saddling hooks via ISaddleAble adapters.$(br2)Right-click saddle to mount if you're recognized owner — shears strip saddles gently.

pages.title: Rendering clues
pages.text: Borrowed saddle textures overlay borrowed geometry — mismatched mob frankensteins still display saddles when torso donor qualifies.
